R Notebook

library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(fixest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)
library(splp)
library(MatchIt)
library(cobalt)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
setFixest_notes(FALSE)
source("../emileRegs.R")

Data

myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
# Also load full panel for comparison
pwt  <- read_stata("../raw_data/pwt_clean.dta")
tcs  <- read_stata("../raw_data/ibtracs_clean.dta")
data_full <- pwt %>% left_join(tcs, by = c("year", "countrycode"))

knot_to_ms <- 0.514444
data <- data_full %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind  = replace_na(max_ann_wind_i_nob, 0) * knot_to_ms,
    loggdp   = ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp_diff = growth_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    year2    = year^2,
    period   = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990")
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 1969) %>%
mutate(
  maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind[maxwind > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
  maxwind_95  = as.integer(maxwind_p95 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p95),

  maxwind_p99 = quantile(maxwind[maxwind > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
  maxwind_99  = as.integer(maxwind_p99 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p99),

  cat1_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 32.7),
  cat2_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 49.4),
  cat3_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 70.0),

  region = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "region"),
  region = ifelse(is.na(region), "Other", region),

  continent = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "continent"),
  continent = ifelse(is.na(continent), "Other", continent)
)

country_gdp <- data %>%
  filter(!is.na(loggdp)) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_loggdp = mean(loggdp, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_gdp_pc = exp(mean(loggdp, na.rm = TRUE)),
    n_shocks_95 = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_wind  = sum(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    income_tercile = ntile(mean_loggdp, 3),
    income_tercile_label = factor(
      income_tercile,
      levels = 1:3,
      labels = c("T1 (Poorest)", "T2", "T3 (Richest)")
    )
  )

data <- data %>%
  left_join(
    country_gdp %>% select(countrycode, income_tercile, income_tercile_label,
                            mean_loggdp, mean_gdp_pc),
    by = "countrycode"
  )

Matching

# Classify treated vs never-treated
treated_countries <- data %>%
  filter(cat1_plus == 1) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  unique()

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    ever_treated = countrycode %in% treated_countries,
    region = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "region"),
    region = ifelse(is.na(region), "Other", region),
    continent = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "continent"),
    continent = ifelse(is.na(continent), "Other", continent)
  )

cat(sprintf("Treated countries: %d\n", length(treated_countries)))
Treated countries: 36
cat(sprintf("Never-treated countries: %d\n",
            n_distinct(data$countrycode) - length(treated_countries)))
Never-treated countries: 146
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Compute pre-treatment country-level means (pre-1990)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
country_chars <- data %>%
  filter(year <= 1990) %>%
  group_by(countrycode, ever_treated, region, continent) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_land     = mean(land_sqkm, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_pop      = mean(log(pop + 1), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(.))

cat(sprintf("\nCountries with complete pre-1990 data: %d\n", nrow(country_chars)))

Countries with complete pre-1990 data: 57
cat(sprintf("  Treated: %d\n", sum(country_chars$ever_treated)))
  Treated: 33
cat(sprintf("  Never-treated: %d\n", sum(!country_chars$ever_treated)))
  Never-treated: 24
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Balance table: treated vs never-treated
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
balance <- country_chars %>%
  group_by(ever_treated) %>%
  summarise(
    across(starts_with("mean_"),
           list(avg = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
           .names = "{.col}_{.fn}")
  ) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(ever_treated, "Treated", "Never-Treated"))

cat("\n========== BALANCE TABLE (Pre-1990 Means) ==========\n")

========== BALANCE TABLE (Pre-1990 Means) ==========
cat(sprintf("%-25s %15s %15s %12s\n",
            "Variable", "Treated", "Never-Treated", "Std. Diff"))
Variable                          Treated   Never-Treated    Std. Diff
cat(paste(rep("-", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
---------------------------------------------------------------------- 
vars <- c("mean_land", "mean_pop")
var_labels <- c("Land Area (sq km)", "Log Population")

std_diffs <- numeric(length(vars))
for (i in seq_along(vars)) {
  t_avg <- balance[[paste0(vars[i], "_avg")]][balance$ever_treated]
  t_sd  <- balance[[paste0(vars[i], "_sd")]][balance$ever_treated]
  c_avg <- balance[[paste0(vars[i], "_avg")]][!balance$ever_treated]
  c_sd  <- balance[[paste0(vars[i], "_sd")]][!balance$ever_treated]
  pooled_sd <- sqrt((t_sd^2 + c_sd^2) / 2)
  std_diffs[i] <- (t_avg - c_avg) / pooled_sd

  cat(sprintf("%-25s %7.3f (%4.2f) %7.3f (%4.2f)  %8.3f\n",
              var_labels[i], t_avg, t_sd, c_avg, c_sd, std_diffs[i]))
}
Land Area (sq km)         1954593.394 (3925020.41) 255676.208 (355898.35)     0.610
Log Population              2.806 (1.87)   1.576 (1.41)     0.742
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Region distribution
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n========== REGION DISTRIBUTION ==========\n")

========== REGION DISTRIBUTION ==========
region_tab <- country_chars %>%
  count(ever_treated, continent) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = ever_treated, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  rename(NeverTreated = `FALSE`, Treated = `TRUE`)
print(region_tab)
# A tibble: 5 × 3
  continent NeverTreated Treated
  <chr>            <int>   <int>
1 Africa               7       3
2 Americas             9      13
3 Asia                 4      14
4 Europe               3       1
5 Oceania              1       2
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Distribution plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

plot_df <- country_chars %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(ever_treated, "Treated (40)", "Never-Treated (142)")) %>%
  select(countrycode, group, mean_land, mean_pop) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("mean_"),
               names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(variable = case_when(
    variable == "mean_land" ~ "Land Area (sq km)",
    variable == "mean_pop"  ~ "Log Population"
  ))

p_dist <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = value, fill = group, color = group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Treated (40)" = "firebrick",
                                "Never-Treated (142)" = "steelblue")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Treated (40)" = "firebrick",
                                 "Never-Treated (142)" = "steelblue")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Density",
       title = "Pre-Treatment Covariate Distributions: Treated vs Never-Treated",
       subtitle = "Pre-1990 country means — Land Area & Population",
       fill = NULL, color = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

p_dist

ggsave("figures/covariate_imbalance.png", p_dist,
       width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)

cat("\nSaved: figures/covariate_imbalance.png\n")

Saved: figures/covariate_imbalance.png

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Prepare matching data (one row per country, pre-1990 means)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
match_data <- country_chars %>%
  select(countrycode, ever_treated, mean_land, mean_pop, continent) %>%
  rename(treated = ever_treated) %>%
  filter(complete.cases(.))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. MatchIt: Coarsened Exact Matching (CEM)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
m_cem <- matchit(
  treated ~ mean_land + mean_pop + continent,
  data = match_data,
  method = "cem",
  cutpoints = list(
    mean_land = 4,
    mean_pop  = 4
  )
)

cat("\n========== CEM SUMMARY ==========\n")

========== CEM SUMMARY ==========
print(summary(m_cem))

Call:
matchit(formula = treated ~ mean_land + mean_pop + continent, 
    data = match_data, method = "cem", cutpoints = list(mean_land = 4, 
        mean_pop = 4))

Summary of Balance for All Data:
                  Means Treated Means Control Std. Mean Diff. Var. Ratio eCDF Mean eCDF Max
mean_land          1954593.3939   255676.2083          0.4328   121.6275    0.1780   0.3561
mean_pop                 2.8060        1.5762          0.6582     1.7479    0.1944   0.3295
continentAfrica          0.0909        0.2917         -0.6983          .    0.2008   0.2008
continentAmericas        0.3939        0.3750          0.0388          .    0.0189   0.0189
continentAsia            0.4242        0.1667          0.5212          .    0.2576   0.2576
continentEurope          0.0303        0.1250         -0.5524          .    0.0947   0.0947
continentOceania         0.0606        0.0417          0.0794          .    0.0189   0.0189

Summary of Balance for Matched Data:
                  Means Treated Means Control Std. Mean Diff. Var. Ratio eCDF Mean eCDF Max Std. Pair Dist.
mean_land           284991.6154   377913.2692         -0.0237     1.1038     0.113   0.3077          0.0530
mean_pop                 2.2516        2.1670          0.0453     0.8836     0.083   0.2308          0.3431
continentAfrica          0.1154        0.1154          0.0000          .     0.000   0.0000          0.0000
continentAmericas        0.3846        0.3846          0.0000          .     0.000   0.0000          0.0000
continentAsia            0.4615        0.4615          0.0000          .     0.000   0.0000          0.0000
continentEurope          0.0000        0.0000          0.0000          .     0.000   0.0000          0.0000
continentOceania         0.0385        0.0385          0.0000          .     0.000   0.0000          0.0000

Sample Sizes:
              Control Treated
All             24.        33
Matched (ESS)    7.91      26
Matched         17.        26
Unmatched        7.         7
Discarded        0.         0
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. SMD before vs after: Love plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
love_plot <- love.plot(
  m_cem,
  stats        = "mean.diffs",
  thresholds   = c(m = 0.1),
  abs          = TRUE,
  var.order    = "unadjusted",
  var.names    = c(
    mean_land = "Land Area (sq km)",
    mean_pop  = "Log Population",
    continent = "Continent"
  ),
  colors       = c("steelblue", "firebrick"),
  shapes       = c("circle", "triangle"),
  size         = 3.5,
  title        = "Covariate Balance Before and After CEM",
  sample.names = c("Before Matching", "After Matching")
) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title    = element_blank(),
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/cem_love_plot.png", love_plot,
       width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
cat("Saved: figures/cem_love_plot.png\n")
Saved: figures/cem_love_plot.png
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Post-matching density plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
matched_data <- match.data(m_cem)

n_treated <- sum(matched_data$treated == 1)
n_control <- sum(matched_data$treated == 0)

treated_label <- sprintf("Treated (%d)", n_treated)
control_label <- sprintf("Never-Treated (%d)", n_control)
group_colors  <- c("firebrick", "steelblue")
names(group_colors) <- c(treated_label, control_label)

plot_df_matched <- matched_data %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(treated == 1, treated_label, control_label)) %>%
  select(countrycode, group, weights, mean_land, mean_pop) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("mean_"),
               names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(variable = case_when(
    variable == "mean_land" ~ "Land Area (sq km)",
    variable == "mean_pop"  ~ "Log Population"
  ))

p_density_matched <- ggplot(
  plot_df_matched,
  aes(x = value, fill = group, color = group, weight = weights)
) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  labs(
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Density",
    title    = "Post-Matching Covariate Distributions: Treated vs Control",
    subtitle = "Weighted by CEM matching weights — Land Area & Population",
    fill     = NULL,
    color    = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(color = "grey40"),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  )

ggsave("figures/cem_density_matched.png", p_density_matched,
       width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
cat("Saved: figures/cem_density_matched.png\n")
Saved: figures/cem_density_matched.png
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Matched panel data for downstream analysis
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
matched_countries <- matched_data$countrycode

data_matched <- data %>%
  inner_join(
    matched_data %>% select(countrycode, weights, subclass),
    by = "countrycode"
  )

cat(sprintf("\nMatched sample: %d treated, %d never-treated\n",
            n_treated, n_control))

Matched sample: 26 treated, 17 never-treated
cat(sprintf("Matched panel observations: %d\n", nrow(data_matched)))
Matched panel observations: 1978
love_plot

p_density_matched

# Get matched country codes and weights from MatchIt
matched_data <- match.data(m_cem)

# Join back to the full panel data using matched countries + weights
data_matched <- data %>%
  inner_join(
    matched_data %>% select(countrycode, weights, subclass),
    by = "countrycode"
  )

mod_balance <- feols(maxwind ~ land_sqkm + pop + rkna + hc,
                 data = data, vcov = ~countrycode)
mod_match <- feols(maxwind ~ land_sqkm + pop + rkna + hc,
                 data = data_matched, vcov = ~countrycode)

etable(mod_balance, mod_match, digits = 3)
                      mod_balance          mod_match
Dependent Var.:           maxwind            maxwind
                                                    
Constant           19.4*** (3.47)     25.8*** (4.31)
land_sqkm       2.96e-7 (5.49e-7) -6.55e-6 (4.96e-6)
pop                 0.005 (0.004)      0.034 (0.047)
rkna            9.85e-8 (1.22e-7)  4.44e-7 (4.25e-7)
hc                   3.89* (1.76)       0.670 (2.09)
_______________ _________________ __________________
S.E.: Clustered   by: countrycode    by: countrycode
Observations                  895                585
R2                        0.10266            0.04909
Adj. R2                   0.09862            0.04254
---
Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
outcome  <- "loggdp"
horizon  <- 10
controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2) + l(cat1_plus,1:2)"
panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
vcov_fm  <- DK ~ year

irf_cem_yearfe <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_matched, outcome = outcome, main_var = "cat1_plus",
  interact_var = "period", controls = controls,
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
) %>%
  mutate(
    category = case_when(
      str_detect(category, "Pre")  ~ "Pre-1990",
      str_detect(category, "Post") ~ "Post-1990",
      TRUE ~ category
    ),
    spec = "CEM + Year FE"
  )

irf_cem_regionfe <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_matched, outcome = outcome, main_var = "cat1_plus",
  interact_var = "period", controls = controls,
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + region^year",
  panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
) %>%
  mutate(
    category = case_when(
      str_detect(category, "Pre")  ~ "Pre-1990",
      str_detect(category, "Post") ~ "Post-1990",
      TRUE ~ category
    ),
    spec = "CEM + Region×Year FE"
  )

# Full-sample baseline
irf_baseline <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data, outcome = outcome, main_var = "cat1_plus",
  interact_var = "period", controls = controls,
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
) %>%
  mutate(
    category = case_when(
      str_detect(category, "Pre")  ~ "Pre-1990",
      str_detect(category, "Post") ~ "Post-1990",
      TRUE ~ category
    ),
    spec = "Full Sample + Year FE"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plot comparison
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

plot_df <- bind_rows(irf_baseline, irf_cem_yearfe, irf_cem_regionfe) %>%
  mutate(spec = factor(spec, levels = c("Full Sample + Year FE",
                                         "CEM + Year FE",
                                         "CEM + Region×Year FE")))

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean,
                          color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey50") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  facet_wrap(~spec, ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-1990" = "steelblue", "Post-1990" = "firebrick")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-1990" = "steelblue", "Post-1990" = "firebrick")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:10) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative effect on log GDP per capita",
    title = "Coarsened Exact Matching: Period-Interacted IRFs",
    subtitle = "CEM on binned log GDP, human capital, and continent",
    color = NULL, fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey40"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_cem.png", p, width = 14, height = 5.5, dpi = 300)
p

cat("\nSaved: figures/irf_cem.png\n")

Saved: figures/irf_cem.png

Income Heterogeneity

map_data <- world %>%
  left_join(
    country_gdp %>% select(countrycode, income_tercile_label),
    by = c("adm0_a3" = "countrycode")
  ) %>% 
  #remove Antarctica and disputed areas
  filter(!adm0_a3 %in% c("ATA"))

fig_map <- ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = income_tercile_label), color = "white", linewidth = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "T1 (Poorest)" = "#d73027",
      "T2"           = "#91bfdb",
      "T3 (Richest)" = "#1a6faf"
    ),
    na.value = "grey85",
    name     = "Income Tercile"
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  labs(
    title    = "Countries by Mean GDP per Capita Tercile",
    subtitle = "Based on log GDP per capita averaged over sample period",
    caption  = "Grey = no data"
  ) +
  theme_void(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40"),
    plot.caption    = element_text(hjust = 1, color = "grey60"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title    = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, label.position = "bottom"))

ggsave("figures/map_income_terciles.png", fig_map,
       width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
fig_map

# LP settings
outcome  <- "loggdp"
horizon  <- 10
make_controls <- function(shock_var) {
  paste0("l(gdp_diff,1:2) + l(", shock_var, ",1:2)")
}
fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + region^year"
panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
vcov_fm  <- DK ~ year

irf_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
irfs_tercile <- map_dfr(1:3, function(t) {
  label <- levels(country_gdp$income_tercile_label)[t]
  cat(sprintf("  Estimating LP for %s...\n", label))
  sub_data <- data %>% filter(income_tercile == t)
  tryCatch({
    lp_panel_inter(
      data = sub_data,
      outcome = outcome,
      main_var = "cat1_plus",
      interact_var = "period",
      controls = make_controls("cat1_plus"),
      horizon = horizon,
      fe = fe,
      panel_id = panel_id,
      vcov_formula = vcov_fm
    ) %>%
      mutate(income_group = label)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("    Error for %s: %s\n", label, e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
})
  Estimating LP for T1 (Poorest)...
  Estimating LP for T2...
  Estimating LP for T3 (Richest)...
# Clean category names
irfs_tercile <- irfs_tercile %>%
  mutate(category = ifelse(grepl("Pre", category), "Pre-1990", "Post-1990"))

# Print summary at h=5
cat("\n--- IRF at h=5 by income tercile and period ---\n")

--- IRF at h=5 by income tercile and period ---
irfs_tercile %>%
  filter(horizon == 5) %>%
  select(income_group, category, irf_mean, se, irf_down, irf_up) %>%
  arrange(income_group, category) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  print(digits = 4, row.names = FALSE)
 income_group  category  irf_mean       se irf_down    irf_up
 T1 (Poorest) Post-1990 -0.021871 0.017638 -0.05644  0.012699
 T1 (Poorest)  Pre-1990 -0.025950 0.012381 -0.05022 -0.001682
           T2 Post-1990 -0.001050 0.009825 -0.02031  0.018208
           T2  Pre-1990 -0.009289 0.019481 -0.04747  0.028895
 T3 (Richest) Post-1990 -0.016544 0.021069 -0.05784  0.024751
 T3 (Richest)  Pre-1990  0.014099 0.020246 -0.02558  0.053781
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plot: 3-panel figure, one per tercile
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
fig_tercile <- irfs_tercile %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(category, levels = c("Pre-1990", "Post-1990")),
    income_group = factor(income_group,
                          levels = c("T1 (Poorest)", "T2", "T3 (Richest)"))
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~income_group, ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-1990" = "steelblue", "Post-1990" = "firebrick")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-1990" = "steelblue", "Post-1990" = "firebrick")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)", y = "GDP response",
    color = "Period", fill = "Period"
  ) +
  irf_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave("figures/irf_income_terciles_by_period.png", fig_tercile,
       width = 11, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
fig_tercile

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# IRFs by income tercile using interaction LP
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
irfs_tercile <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data,
  outcome = outcome,
  main_var = "cat1_plus",
  interact_var = "income_tercile",
  controls = make_controls("cat1_plus"),
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = fe,
  panel_id = panel_id,
  vcov_formula = vcov_fm
) %>%
  mutate(
    income_group = case_when(
      category == "1" ~ "T1 (Poorest)",
      category == "2" ~ "T2",
      category == "3" ~ "T3 (Richest)"
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Print summary at h = 5
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n--- IRF at h=5 by income tercile ---\n")

--- IRF at h=5 by income tercile ---
irfs_tercile %>%
  filter(horizon == 5) %>%
  select(income_group, irf_mean, se, irf_down, irf_up) %>%
  arrange(income_group) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  print(digits = 4, row.names = FALSE)
 income_group   irf_mean      se irf_down    irf_up
 T1 (Poorest) -0.0259607 0.01046 -0.04646 -0.005457
           T2  0.0007856 0.01210 -0.02294  0.024507
 T3 (Richest) -0.0054077 0.01599 -0.03674  0.025925
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot: 3-panel IRF figure
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
fig_tercile <- irfs_tercile %>%
  mutate(
    income_group = factor(
      income_group,
      levels = c("T1 (Poorest)", "T2", "T3 (Richest)")
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15,
    fill = "steelblue",
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(
    linewidth = 1.1,
    color = "steelblue"
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~income_group, ncol = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP response"
  ) +
  irf_theme

ggsave(
  "figures/irf_income_terciles.png",
  fig_tercile,
  width = 11,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)
fig_tercile

irfs_tercile <- map_dfr(1:3, function(t) {
  label <- levels(country_gdp$income_tercile_label)[t]
  cat(sprintf("  Estimating LP for %s...\n", label))
  sub_data <- data_matched %>% filter(income_tercile == t)
  tryCatch({
    lp_panel_inter(
      data = sub_data,
      outcome = outcome,
      main_var = "cat1_plus",
      interact_var = "period",
      controls = make_controls("cat1_plus"),
      horizon = horizon,
      fe = fe,
      panel_id = panel_id,
      vcov_formula = vcov_fm
    ) %>%
      mutate(income_group = label)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("    Error for %s: %s\n", label, e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
})
  Estimating LP for T1 (Poorest)...
  Estimating LP for T2...
  Estimating LP for T3 (Richest)...
# Clean category names
irfs_tercile <- irfs_tercile %>%
  mutate(category = ifelse(grepl("Pre", category), "Pre-1990", "Post-1990"))

# Print summary at h=5
cat("\n--- IRF at h=5 by income tercile and period ---\n")

--- IRF at h=5 by income tercile and period ---
irfs_tercile %>%
  filter(horizon == 5) %>%
  select(income_group, category, irf_mean, se, irf_down, irf_up) %>%
  arrange(income_group, category) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  print(digits = 4, row.names = FALSE)
 income_group  category irf_mean      se irf_down    irf_up
 T1 (Poorest) Post-1990 -0.02477 0.02453 -0.07285  0.023319
 T1 (Poorest)  Pre-1990 -0.03823 0.01792 -0.07336 -0.003108
           T2 Post-1990 -0.01206 0.01274 -0.03703  0.012914
           T2  Pre-1990  0.01795 0.01930 -0.01988  0.055789
 T3 (Richest) Post-1990 -0.09417 0.04663 -0.18557 -0.002779
 T3 (Richest)  Pre-1990  0.07950 0.06249 -0.04298  0.201984
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plot: 3-panel figure, one per tercile
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
fig_tercile <- irfs_tercile %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(category, levels = c("Pre-1990", "Post-1990")),
    income_group = factor(income_group,
                          levels = c("T1 (Poorest)", "T2", "T3 (Richest)"))
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~income_group, ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-1990" = "steelblue", "Post-1990" = "firebrick")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Pre-1990" = "steelblue", "Post-1990" = "firebrick")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)", y = "GDP response",
    color = "Period", fill = "Period"
  ) +
  irf_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave("figures/irf_income_terciles_by_period_csm.png", fig_tercile,
       width = 11, height = 4.5, dpi = 300)
fig_tercile

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# IRFs by income tercile — original + matched
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
run_tercile_irfs <- function(df, label) {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data         = df,
    outcome      = outcome,
    main_var     = "cat1_plus",
    interact_var = "income_tercile",
    controls     = make_controls("cat1_plus"),
    horizon      = horizon,
    fe           = fe,
    panel_id     = panel_id,
    vcov_formula = vcov_fm
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      sample = label,
      income_group = case_when(
        category == "1" ~ "T1 (Poorest)",
        category == "2" ~ "T2",
        category == "3" ~ "T3 (Richest)"
      )
    )
}

irfs_tercile <- bind_rows(
  run_tercile_irfs(data,         "Unmatched"),
  run_tercile_irfs(data_matched, "Matched")
) %>%
  mutate(
    income_group = factor(
      income_group,
      levels = c("T1 (Poorest)", "T2", "T3 (Richest)")
    ),
    sample = factor(sample, levels = c("Unmatched", "Matched"))
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Print summary at h = 5
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n--- IRF at h=5 by income tercile ---\n")

--- IRF at h=5 by income tercile ---
irfs_tercile %>%
  filter(horizon == 5) %>%
  select(sample, income_group, irf_mean, se, irf_down, irf_up) %>%
  arrange(income_group, sample) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  print(digits = 4, row.names = FALSE)
    sample income_group   irf_mean      se irf_down    irf_up
 Unmatched T1 (Poorest) -0.0259607 0.01046 -0.04646 -0.005457
   Matched T1 (Poorest) -0.0371047 0.01276 -0.06211 -0.012097
 Unmatched           T2  0.0007856 0.01210 -0.02294  0.024507
   Matched           T2  0.0070219 0.01527 -0.02290  0.036944
 Unmatched T3 (Richest) -0.0054077 0.01599 -0.03674  0.025925
   Matched T3 (Richest) -0.0105454 0.02967 -0.06870  0.047607
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot: 3-panel IRF figure with matched overlay
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
fig_tercile <- irfs_tercile %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x     = horizon,
    y     = irf_mean,
    color = sample,
    fill  = sample
  )) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.12,
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~income_group, ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Unmatched" = "steelblue", "Matched" = "tomato")) +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("Unmatched" = "steelblue", "Matched" = "tomato")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  labs(
    x     = "Horizon (years)",
    y     = "GDP response",
    color = NULL,
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  irf_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(
  "figures/irf_income_terciles_matched.png",
  fig_tercile,
  width  = 11,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 300
)
fig_tercile

Geographic Heterogeneity

irfs_continent <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data,
  outcome = outcome,
  main_var = "cat1_plus",
  interact_var = "continent",
  controls = make_controls("cat1_plus"),
  horizon = horizon,
  fe = fe,
  panel_id = panel_id,
  vcov_formula = vcov_fm
) %>%
  rename(continent = category)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Print summary at h = 5
# ------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("\n--- IRF at h=5 by continent ---\n")

--- IRF at h=5 by continent ---
irfs_continent %>%
  filter(horizon == 5) %>%
  select(continent, irf_mean, se, irf_down, irf_up) %>%
  arrange(continent) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  print(digits = 4, row.names = FALSE)
 continent  irf_mean      se irf_down    irf_up
    Africa -0.061690 0.02842 -0.11740 -0.005978
  Americas  0.001853 0.01010 -0.01794  0.021646
      Asia -0.021201 0.00983 -0.04047 -0.001935
    Europe -0.085641 0.01587 -0.11675 -0.054536
   Oceania  0.012868 0.01953 -0.02541  0.051151
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot: one panel per continent
# ------------------------------------------------------------------

fig_continent <- irfs_continent %>%
  filter(continent != "Europe") %>%
  mutate(continent = factor(continent, levels = sort(unique(continent)))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15,
    fill = "dodgerblue",
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(
    linewidth = 1.1,
    color = "dodgerblue"
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~continent,ncol=4) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP response"
  ) +
  irf_theme

ggsave(
  "figures/irf_continent.png",
  fig_continent,
  width = 14,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)

fig_continent

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# IRFs by continent — original + matched
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
run_continent_irfs <- function(df, label) {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data         = df,
    outcome      = outcome,
    main_var     = "cat1_plus",
    interact_var = "continent",
    controls     = make_controls("cat1_plus"),
    horizon      = horizon,
    fe           = fe,
    panel_id     = panel_id,
    vcov_formula = vcov_fm
  ) %>%
    rename(continent = category) %>%
    mutate(sample = label)
}

irfs_continent <- bind_rows(
  run_continent_irfs(data,         "Unmatched"),
  run_continent_irfs(data_matched, "Matched")
) %>%
  mutate(sample = factor(sample, levels = c("Unmatched", "Matched")))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Print summary at h = 5
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n--- IRF at h=5 by continent ---\n")

--- IRF at h=5 by continent ---
irfs_continent %>%
  filter(horizon == 5) %>%
  select(sample, continent, irf_mean, se, irf_down, irf_up) %>%
  arrange(continent, sample) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  print(digits = 4, row.names = FALSE)
    sample continent  irf_mean      se irf_down    irf_up
 Unmatched    Africa -0.061690 0.02842 -0.11740 -0.005978
   Matched    Africa -0.082812 0.03908 -0.15941 -0.006214
 Unmatched  Americas  0.001853 0.01010 -0.01794  0.021646
   Matched  Americas  0.005584 0.01480 -0.02342  0.034590
 Unmatched      Asia -0.021201 0.00983 -0.04047 -0.001935
   Matched      Asia -0.029402 0.01046 -0.04989 -0.008909
 Unmatched    Europe -0.085641 0.01587 -0.11675 -0.054536
 Unmatched   Oceania  0.012868 0.01953 -0.02541  0.051151
   Matched   Oceania  0.012852 0.03072 -0.04737  0.073071
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot: one panel per continent with matched overlay
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
fig_continent <- irfs_continent %>%
  filter(continent != "Europe") %>%
  mutate(continent = factor(continent, levels = sort(unique(continent)))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x     = horizon,
    y     = irf_mean,
    color = sample,
    fill  = sample
  )) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.12,
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~continent, ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Unmatched" = "dodgerblue", "Matched" = "tomato")) +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("Unmatched" = "dodgerblue", "Matched" = "tomato")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  labs(
    x     = "Horizon (years)",
    y     = "GDP response",
    color = NULL,
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  irf_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(
  "figures/irf_continent_matched.png",
  fig_continent,
  width  = 14,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi    = 300
)
